Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /greenzone to open the window.
Changelog:
Hotfix:
- Prevents a bad saved FC point sample from stopping GreenZone from loading.
- Keeps the FC chest sync reliability and settings status improvements from 0.1.126.
